notes: Task 2 calibration pre-flight. verdicts[] contains ONLY the 5 calibration skills with full per-clause evidence so the human reviewer can compare structural reference patterns across KEEPs and expected-PRUNEs. Task 3 (full 41-candidate pass) has NOT run — do not treat this as a complete audit.

calibration_results.disagreement_analysis: python-patterns and golang-patterns were expected PRUNE but the rubric as literally written keeps them (clause c passes via non-cruft referrers in reviewer agents, rule files, and commands — structurally identical to tdd-workflow's 11-referrer protection). eval-harness has 1 referrer in the frozen snapshot but it is configure-ecc (cruft). Strict D-13 reading of clause (c) = KEEP; post-cruft reading = PRUNE. Marked UNCERTAIN because the rubric is genuinely ambiguous on whether cruft-only referrers count. Human decision needed on Diagnosis B (tighten clause c to exclude bare 'see skill: X' pointers) vs Diagnosis A (rescope target band).

b.evidence: No references to donnyclaude-native agents, hooks, commands, rule files, MCP server conventions, or the GSD engine in the SKILL.md body. origin: ECC frontmatter but no donnyclaude-specific glue. Pure Python language reference.

c.evidence: 10 referrers found in frozen snapshot (SHA 8d7ef90). Non-cruft referrers (5): packages/agents/python-reviewer.md:94 ('For detailed Python patterns... see skill: python-patterns'), packages/commands/python-review.md:206 (skill catalog list), packages/rules/python/coding-style.md:42 ('See skill: python-patterns'), packages/rules/python/patterns.md:39 ('See skill: python-patterns'), packages/rules/README.md:69 (catalog entry). Cruft/skill-example referrers (5): packages/skills/configure-ecc/SKILL.md (4 occurrences: lines 123, 268, 281, 282) and packages/skills/skill-stocktake/SKILL.md:157 (uses name as an example in audit instruction text). 5 non-cruft referrers match the structural pattern used to protect tdd-workflow in D-14.

verdicts.rationale: Clauses a and b FAIL; clause c PASSES on 10 non-cruft referrers. b.evidence: origin: ECC frontmatter. SKILL.md targets 'Claude Code sessions' and references .claude/evals/ storage convention, but contains no references to donnyclaude-native agents, hooks, commands, rule files, MCP server conventions, or the GSD engine. Frontend integration points are /eval define/check/report slash commands, but these commands do not exist in packages/commands/ — they are ECC-convention commands, not donnyclaude commands.

c.evidence: 1 referrer in frozen snapshot: packages/skills/configure-ecc/SKILL.md:144 (catalog table entry). configure-ecc is pre-determined cruft (D-08) — it will not survive to v1.2. Strict D-13 interpretation (count all referrers in frozen snapshot regardless of whether they survive): 1 > 0 → PASS → KEEP. Post-cruft interpretation (count only non-cruft referrers): 0 → FAIL → PRUNE. Rubric is genuinely ambiguous here and the plan does not resolve the question.
